body:
Good morning, Alexandria friends!

Happy Thursday!!!

This week has been very Mercury retrograde and for now I’ll leave it at that. I hope your week is going better than mine. (I’ll have an update about some of it up in a bit.

I hope you all have a wonderful day and I’ll see you around! 🖤🖤🖤
